question_group.people_num: How many people of each group do you have?
question_group.covid_num: How many times on average has each of these groups contracted COVID-19?
question_group.covax_num: How many doses of COVID-19 vaccine on average has each of these groups received?
question_group.risk_1: How dangerous did you think COVID-19 was to your health in the following periods? (1-5)
question_group.risk_2: How willing were you to be vaccinated against COVID-19 in the following periods? (1-5)
question_group.risk_infection: In your opinion, how likely are you to contract the following infections today? (1-5)
question_group.risk_illness: In your opinion, how likely are you to experience serious health consequences if you contract the following infections? (1-5)
question_group.risk_vax: In your opinion, how likely are you to experience health consequences if you receive the vaccine for the following infections? (1-5)
question_group.emotion_illness: How much do you fear the following infections? (1-5)
question_group.emotion_vax: How much do you fear the vaccine for the following infections? (1-5)
question_group.fluvax: Did you get vaccinated against the flu at least once in the following periods?
question_group.side_effects: Has anyone in the following groups of people experienced any side effects (apart from arm pain) after being administered a dose of any vaccine?
question_group.vax_group: During the pandemic, with how many people in the following groups did you have a conversation about vaccines/vaccination programs (in person, over the phone, or online)?
question_group.vax_freq: During the pandemic, how often did you find yourself participating in a conversation about vaccines/vaccination programs (in person, over the phone, or online) with the following groups?
question_group.opinion: How much do you agree with the following statements? (1-5)
question_group.opinion_change: How has your opinion on the following statement changed?
question_group.institut_trust_vax: How much do you trust the information about vaccines/vaccination programs shared by the following groups? (1-5)
question_group.pandemic_behaviour: How much do you agree with the following statements? (1-7)
question_group.moral1: When you decide whether something is right or wrong, to what extent are the following statements relevant to your thinking? (1-6)
question_group.moral2: How much do you agree with the following statements? (1-5)
question_group.info: Select the information channels you primarily use
question_group.contact_group: With how many people in the following groups did you have a direct contact YESTERDAY?
question_group.discussion_group: Thinking of LAST week, with how many different people in the following groups did you have a relevant conversation with?
question_group.opinion_other: To what extent do the following groups agree or disagree with the provided statement? (1-7)

old_columns.question: In which country was the test taken?
When was the test started?
old_columns.answer: Datetime object of the start date of the test

old_columns.question: When was the test ended?
old_columns.answer: Datetime object of the end date of the test

old_columns.question: When was the test recorded?
old_columns.answer: Datetime object of the date when the test was recorded

old_columns.question: What browser is the user using?
What OS is the user using?
